summary: Tested all 12 features from the review request: UI redesign (goal headers, quest rows, EP badge, receipt), mobile hide/show, PWA manifest+sw+iOS meta tags. All tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 features verified: (1) Goal headers - uppercase, gray-400 color, border-bottom separator, green EP pill badge on right ✅. (2) Quest rows - py-3.5 style padding (14px 16px), border-b border-white/5 separators except last ✅. (3) Base quest text is text-gray-300 (#D1D5DB) ✅. (4) SelectedTasksReceipt has cyan border-top (rgba(0,229,255,0.3)), goal in tiny uppercase gray, activity text-xs gray-300 with line-clamp ✅. (5) Quest selection works - green bg + check circle ✅. (6) Building panel has 'hidden sm:flex' classes, computed display=none on mobile ✅. (7) MobileReceiptBar exists and shows when quests selected on mobile ✅. (8) /manifest.json accessible ✅. (9) /sw.js accessible ✅. (10) iOS PWA meta tags: apple-mobile-web-app-capable=yes, apple-mobile-web-app-title=Superhero HQ ✅. (11) Page title = 'Superhero HQ' ✅. (12) Reset Sprint clears selections ✅.
